_comment: Browser-demo fixture mirroring the live Holding On experience (fixture 12 captures the production wire shape verbatim) but with display_directives:[cinematic_fullscreen] applied to the video item. Validates that VIDEO content renders correctly under cinematic_fullscreen — chrome=none, sizing=fullscreen, autoplay=muted. Uses the actual production media URL via the share_token preserved from the live response, so we test against real platform-served media (subject to share_token validity at fetch time). Falls back to MDN's CC0 flower.mp4 if the production URL is unreachable.
name: Demo — Holding On (video item, cinematic)
description: Video rendered in cinematic fullscreen mode using the Holding On experience's actual video item.
